evidence.voiceover: Mascot suffers, fake typing online. An accountant I know returned from two weeks off to find dozens of website visits — real people, real questions — and not one contact detail left behind. Zero. Because the site just sat there, silent. Your website isn't offline when you're away. It's open. And it's turning people away for you, every single night, without saying a word.

A person in a full mascot costume — oversized head, full suit — stands just outside a glass door waving at nobody in particular.
